categories.pain_summary: Couples juggle vendor contacts, timelines, budgets, guest lists, and task assignments across multiple people with fragmented tools.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Wedding planners live in spreadsheets, Pinterest boards, and scattered notes; offline access critical for venue visits; household sharing essential for partner collaboration.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Wedding planner printables are top-performing Etsy category; strong search volume for 'wedding planning organizer' and 'wedding checklist'.
categories.verdict_reason: Perfect PWA fit with proven Etsy demand, seasonal predictability, and natural multi-person coordination need.

categories.pain_summary: Homeschool parents track multiple children's subjects, lessons, progress, assignments, and schedules across a flexible curriculum.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Homeschoolers heavily use printables and binders; offline app works during lessons; parent-child or multi-parent sharing is common.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Homeschool planner printables and curriculum organizers are consistently high-search Etsy items; loyal repeat buyer base.
categories.verdict_reason: Strong evergreen demand, clear PWA advantage over printables, and natural household sharing for parent-led education.

categories.pain_summary: Multi-pet households track vet appointments, medications, feeding schedules, grooming, and health records across family members.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Pet owners use sticky notes and phone reminders; offline access useful for vet visits; household sharing needed for multiple caregivers.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Pet care organizers, vet record trackers, and pet planner printables show consistent Etsy search volume and buyer interest.
categories.verdict_reason: Mirrors caregiver app logic (meds, appointments, notes) but for pets; evergreen demand with strong PWA fit and household sharing need.

categories.pain_summary: Landlords and property managers track tenants, rent collection, maintenance requests, inspections, expenses, and lease dates across multiple properties.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Property managers use spreadsheets and scattered documents; offline access essential for on-site property visits; multi-user sharing for co-owners or property managers.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Landlord and property management printables exist but lower search volume than lifestyle planners; niche but committed buyer audience.
categories.verdict_reason: Strong PWA fit and sharing need, but validate Etsy demand first; may require marketing beyond Etsy or positioning as 'Landlord Admin' to reach buyers.

categories.pain_summary: Freelancers manage multiple clients, project timelines, invoicing, contracts, rates, and deadlines across platforms and spreadsheets.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Freelancers live in Notion, Airtable, and spreadsheets; lightweight PWA avoids subscription fatigue; offline access useful for remote work.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Freelancer planner and invoice tracker printables have moderate Etsy search; audience exists but smaller than lifestyle planning.
categories.verdict_reason: Solid PWA fit, but validate whether Etsy buyers prefer free tools (Notion) or printables over web apps; may need audience testing.

categories.pain_summary: Households plan weekly meals, manage grocery lists, track dietary preferences, and coordinate shopping across family members.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Meal planners use paper lists and phone notes; offline access critical in grocery store; household sharing essential for family meal coordination.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Meal planning printables, grocery list templates, and weekly planner bundles are top-performing Etsy categories with strong repeat search.
categories.verdict_reason: High Etsy demand, excellent PWA fit for grocery store use, natural household sharing, and evergreen seasonal stability.

categories.pain_summary: Moving households manage packing checklists, room inventories, utility transfers, address changes, and moving day timelines across family members.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Movers use printed checklists and scattered notes; offline access essential during move chaos; family sharing needed for coordinating tasks.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Moving checklist and house organizer printables see strong seasonal Etsy search spike; established category with loyal buyers.
categories.verdict_reason: Seasonal spike with predictable demand window; PWA format superior to printables for dynamic updates; clear household coordination need.

categories.pain_summary: New parents track feeding schedules, diaper changes, sleep patterns, milestones, doctor appointments, and postpartum recovery across parents.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: New parents use paper logs and phone notes; offline app critical for middle-of-night tracking; co-parent sharing essential for coordinating care.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Baby tracker printables, feeding logs, and postpartum planners are consistently high-search Etsy items with strong emotional buyer investment.
categories.verdict_reason: Mirrors caregiver app structure (tracking, notes, coordination); seasonal demand predictable; PWA format superior to paper logs for real-time sharing.

categories.pain_summary: Event organizers manage vendor logistics, guest lists, timelines, budgets, RSVPs, and task delegation across team members or co-planners.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Event planners use spreadsheets and scattered vendor documents; offline access useful during events; multi-person coordination critical.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Event planning checklists, party organizer printables, and budget trackers show strong Etsy search and seasonal spikes.
categories.verdict_reason: Strong demand and PWA fit, but validate differentiation from Wedding Planning App—may be too similar or should merge into broader 'Occasion Planning App'.
categories.suggested_product_name: Event Planner App (or merge with Wedding app)

categories.pain_summary: Parents and students track school calendars, assignments, parent volunteer dates, supply lists, and class schedules across children.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: School planners use paper planners and printables; offline access useful for school pickup planning; household sharing needed for multi-child families.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Back-to-school planner printables are Etsy seasonal top performers; strong recurring demand Aug-Sep.
categories.verdict_reason: Strong seasonal demand and PWA fit, but validate whether this overlaps with Homeschool Planner App or should target traditional schools separately.

categories.pain_summary: Gardeners track planting schedules, harvest dates, watering logs, pest management, and plant inventory across growing seasons.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Gardeners use paper logs and reference binders; offline access critical outdoors; household sharing useful for shared garden projects.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Garden planner and planting schedule printables show consistent Etsy search; niche but engaged audience.
categories.verdict_reason: Good PWA fit with proven Etsy demand, but seasonal windows are bimodal and demand smaller than lifestyle planners; validate market size first.

categories.pain_summary: Homeowners manage contractor contact info, project timelines, budgets, materials lists, and payment schedules across renovation phases.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Renovators use spreadsheets and paper notes; offline access essential for construction sites; multi-person sharing for co-owners and contractors.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Home renovation checklists and project planner printables exist on Etsy but with lower search volume than lifestyle planning categories.
categories.verdict_reason: Strong PWA fit and seasonal predictability, but validate Etsy demand; may require marketing beyond Etsy or positioning as 'Home Project Manager'.

categories.pain_summary: Travelers organize itineraries, accommodation details, packing lists, budgets, and shared plans across travel companions.
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Travelers use printables and notes; offline access critical for international travel without data; group sharing essential for family/friend trips.
categories.etsy_demand_reason: Travel planner and packing list printables are consistent Etsy performers with multiple seasonal peaks.
categories.verdict_reason: High Etsy demand, excellent PWA fit for offline international use, strong household/group sharing need, and evergreen with seasonal peaks.

categories.pain_summary: Family caregivers managing medications, appointments, care notes and coordinating with multiple household members for a loved one
categories.pwa_fit_reason: Offline access critical during hospital visits, household sharing essential for coordinating care
categories.etsy_demand_reason: High search volume for caregiver planners and organizers on Etsy
categories.verdict_reason: Core product, already have signals, rebuild needed
